nodes.label: ADR-0008: Authentication and Workspace Identity
nodes.rationale: Even though ECC begins as a single local-user system, workspace_id/owner_id and full auth enforcement were required from Phase 0 so no unsafe no-auth default is embedded and later multi-user isolation is not expensive to retrofit. Opaque server-side sessions (not JWT) were chosen because revocation/rotation is simpler for a local modular monolith. No-auth mode, JWT sessions, and OAuth-only login were all explicitly rejected.
